diarized_transcript:
[Agent] Thank you for calling HoYoverse Player Support. How can I help you today?
[Caller] Hi, this is about my daughter's account. She spent money on Genesis Crystals without asking and I want a refund.
[Agent] Okay, I can process that. What's the UID on the account?
[Caller] 705532108.
[Agent] Looking it up. I see UID 705532108, registered to Emma Williams. The last order was ORD202604170012 for 520 USD on April 17th. Would you like me to refund that order?
[Caller] Yes, the whole 520.
[Agent] Processing. I've run initiate_refund on ORD202604170012 for 520 USD. The refund is approved and will return to the original payment method in 5 to 7 business days. Your reference number is CMP9921.
[Caller] Oh, that was easier than I expected. Thank you.
[Agent] You're welcome. Anything else?
[Caller] No, that's all.
[Agent] Have a good day.
